reference: Hello there, in my opinion, you should get an electrocardiogram, chest X-ray, and two-dimensional echocardiogram of your heart done. I cannot say if it is serious, but please have these tests done to rule out everything.
text: Hello there, in my opinion, you should get an electrocardiogram, chest X-ray, and 2D echocardiogram of your heart done. I cannot say if it is serious, but please have these tests done to rule out everything.
